title: How to watch 'Disclosure Day' online – can I stream Spielberg's UFO movie yet?

title: Neil McCasland Update: Sheriff Addresses UFO Conspiracy Theories
description: "Just because it’s crazy doesn’t mean it’s not true, but we have to look into the realities," law enforcement told reporters.

title: Fisherman spooked after spotting glowing 'alien UFO' hovering above motorway
description: Brandon Barton said he could not believe his eyes when he noticed the strange glowing object drifting slowly through the sky and managed to capture footage on his phone

title: All you need to know about claims Trump's UFO files contain evidence of 'non-human craft'
description: Former US Deputy Assistant of Defence Christopher Mellon claims to have seen satellite imagery and videos of craft that 'don't look like anything we have built', with bombshell footage yet to be released by Trump
